hero.subtitle: Helping brands grow through strategic content, creative reels, and marketing campaigns that attract customers and increase engagement.
hero.description: I help restaurants, caf脙漏s, retail stores, and lifestyle brands build a strong social media presence through engaging content and smart marketing strategies.

paragraphs: I'm Mariam Saad, a Social Media Specialist based in Egypt with a passion for helping brands tell their story in a way that converts followers into customers.
With expertise in content creation, paid advertising, and community management, I've helped dozens of businesses grow their online presence and achieve measurable results.
I believe that great social media is a blend of creativity and strategy 芒聙聰 every post, reel, and campaign should have a purpose.

services.title: Social Media Management
services.description: Full management of your social media accounts including content planning, posting, and engagement with your audience.

services.title: Reels & Video Content
services.description: Creative short-form video content tailored for Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook that drives views and engagement.

services.title: Paid Advertising
services.description: Strategic Meta and TikTok ad campaigns designed to maximize ROI and reach your ideal customers.

services.title: Content Creation
services.description: Professional photography direction, copywriting, and graphic design for a cohesive brand aesthetic.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: We start with a deep dive into your brand, goals, and target audience.

process.title: Strategy
process.description: I create a custom content and marketing strategy tailored to your business.

process.title: Execution
process.description: Content is created, scheduled, and published consistently across platforms.

process.title: Growth
process.description: Monthly reports, optimization, and scaling what works to grow your presence.

testimonial.text: Mariam transformed our social media presence completely. Within 3 months we had 3x the followers and our sales from Instagram doubled. She truly understands how to connect a brand with its audience.
testimonial.author: Ahmed K., Restaurant Owner
